title: uraria rotundata
intro: Uraria rotundata, also known as Indian medic, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is commonly found in India and other parts of Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Uraria rotundata is known to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic medicine. The plant is typically prepared as a powder or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to create herbal preparations for various health conditions.
